channel.title: Tech Blog
channel.description: Cutting-edge insights into technology, AI, and development

item.title: Big Tech burnout: the real reasons seniors quit
item.description: Data from 82,000 developers reveals why senior engineers quit big tech — and it’s not about pay. See the hidden workload tax and how to measure it in your team.

item.title: Postgres per-tenant? Try shared tables first
item.description: Cut AWS costs 75% with shared Postgres tables — how 3 Southeast Asian startups avoided tenant-isolation tax and scaled to 150k tenants on $1.2k/month.

item.title: AI skills: which pay 30K more in 2026?
item.description: Fine-tuned LLMs pay 28K more than generic AI skills in 2026. Compare Mistral-7B fine-tuning vs CrewAI agents on latency, cost, and security—with real benchmarks and setup steps.

item.title: AI reads your repo: context gap every team misses
item.description: Cut AI review time 80% by feeding your repo context to LLMs — the repository intelligence graph you’re missing and how to build it in 3 minutes with Python 3.12 and SQLite.

item.title: Instrument LLM pipelines: 14 signals you’re missing
item.description: LLMs: rate from 8% to 0.3% and saved $18k per mo. Practical guide with real examples.

item.title: Fine-tune or prompt: which wins?
item.description: Cut production failures 40% by choosing between fine-tuning and prompt engineering using frozen models, prompt contracts, and guardrails — real 2026 benchmarks.

item.title: Choose the right real-time tech
item.description: Cut real-time latency 60% in 2026 by picking SSE over WebSockets or long polling — concrete benchmarks, code snippets, and the one mistake most teams make first.

item.title: Hidden costs of freelance developer rates
item.description: 2026 freelance developer rate calculator — realistic hourly rates by region, platform fees, currency spreads, and tax rules. Avoid undercharging and walk away from bad deals in 30 seconds.

item.title: MCP servers: why your next tool should run one
item.description: Cut MCP server response time 40% with Rust vs Node.js benchmarks — memory leaks, 30-second timeouts, and the URI trap most teams miss.

item.title: Multi-tenant DB: schema or share?
item.description: Cut database costs 40% and latency 60% with schema-per-tenant in a shared cluster — connection pooling, RLS traps, and the migration path most teams miss

item.title: Fixed 3 freelance burnout cycles in 90 days
item.description: Recover freelance dev burnout in 90 days with rate hikes, sprint cadence, and hardware upgrades. Save 18 work hours per week and raise client NPS from 68 to 82.

item.title: Slashed cloud carbon 37% without losing speed
item.description: Cut cloud carbon 37% without sacrificing speed — real-time analytics pipeline went from 37 to 23 metric tons CO₂/month while lowering latency and bill 32%. How we did it: incremental aggregation, Graviton3, and Redis Streams.

item.title: Negotiate remote pay: country cost index 2026
item.description: Negotiate remote pay with a 2026 country cost index — concrete rates, formula, and negotiation scripts to stop guessing and start charging what clients expect to pay.

item.title: Laptops can run LLMs: stop outsourcing the model
item.description: Run 7B LLMs locally on a laptop — cost $0, latency 450 ms, accuracy 87%. Benchmarks, cost breakdowns, and the exact tools to avoid cloud waste.

item.title: AI sees your repo: the context gap most teams miss
item.description: Build repository intelligence graphs to cut AI PR review errors 83% — import-analyzer, networkx, and embeddings that actually understand your codebase contracts

item.title: Self-taught to senior: the real path no one admits
item.description: ps from 0.2% to 18% in 90 seconds. It does with Self-taught senior path one — a CS degree goes like this: build projects, contri.

item.title: Track 7 signals in LLM pipelines
item.description: Instrument LLM pipelines with 30 metrics and traces to cut latency 46% and errors 95% — FastAPI, LangChain, OpenTelemetry, Prometheus, Grafana in 2026.

item.title: Fix RAG pipelines’ hidden latency costs
item.description: Cut RAG latency 80%: BM25 filter, hybrid rerank, Redis cache, and LLM early exit saved $90/month and avoided a $5k GPU purchase — the real levers most tutorials skip.

item.title: Senior devs flee big tech: hidden costs
item.description: Senior devs quit tech: In 2026, 68% of mid-size teams that failed. Practical guide with real examples.

item.title: 5G backend design rules: cellular latency traps
item.description: Cut 5G backend latency 26% and errors 85% with connection pooling, TLS timeouts, and p99 instrumentation. Learn carrier-grade tuning rules that break common assumptions.
